ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project category */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the goal of the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "num_successful" INTEGER /* Number of successful projects */,
  "num_failed" INTEGER /* Number of failed projects */,
  "num_canceled" INTEGER /* Number of canceled projects */,
  "total_projects" INTEGER /* Total number of projects in the category */,
  "percentage_successful" REAL /* Percentage of successful projects */,
  "percentage_failed" REAL /* Percentage of failed projects */,
  "percentage_canceled" REAL /* Percentage of canceled projects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal category */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the goal category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the goal category */,
  "min_budget" INTEGER /* Minimum budget for the goal category */,
  "max_budget" INTEGER /* Maximum budget for the goal category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project being evaluated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., ROI, duration) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., %, days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report is based on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that has changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_category_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_category_map_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES project_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_category_map_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
